name: Saibo Co., Ltd.
summary: Saibo Co., Ltd. primarily manufactures and sells textile products in Japan and internationally. It offers apparel products, such as corporate office uniforms, working wear, service wear, jackets, and suits; and novelty and sports-related products. The company also provides textile materials, including rayon filament yarn, polyester yarn, mixed yarn, synthetic cotton, and polyester and linen fabrics, as well as embroidery lace materials. In addition, it engages in the rental of commercial facilities and real estate properties, as well as golf driving range management activities. Further, the company manufactures and sells automatic water supply pots and plants; provision of repairing services for automobile sheet metal paint products; provision of building maintenance services; interior construction activities; and sale of new and used cars. Saibo Co., Ltd. was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Kawaguchi, Japan.
